items.title: Export engine PDF/Excel rendering
items.desc: Backend IExportEngine throws NotImplementedException; frontend PDF/Excel menu items disabled with v2 tag.
items.notes: ExportEngine.cs:14 throws 'v2'. CSV+JSON already real in analytics-web/src/features/export. Wire ClosedXML (xlsx) + QuestPDF (pdf), then enable the disabled menu items in export/index.tsx.

items.title: FarsNezam lookup-table label joins
items.desc: LEFT JOIN code-to-label machinery exists but only Typ field is wired; most coded dims lack lookups.
items.notes: SqlQueryEngine.BuildSql already emits LEFT JOIN [lk_*] for HasLookup fields and FarsNezamSemanticModelStore wires Typ->tblMap_TypMohandes. ShobeID/ReshteID/Mantaghe/MadrakID still return raw codes (no lookup tables identified in this DB). Add lookup metadata per dimension once reference tables are confirmed.

items.title: Jalali-date bucketing polish
items.desc: Only year/month buckets implemented; day/week/quarter advertised to AI but fall back to plain column.
items.notes: SqlQueryEngine.BuildDimExpression handles only 'year'->LEFT(,4) and 'month'->LEFT(,7) on string Jalali dates. ArvanReportAiService system prompt offers day|week|quarter too, so unsupported buckets silently degrade. Add quarter/day handling, or constrain the prompt.

items.title: AI provider router + cost tracking
items.desc: IAiProviderRouter.CompleteAsync throws v2 and is never called; no token/cost accounting on backend.
items.notes: AiProviderRouter.cs throws 'v2'. Generation goes straight through ArvanReportAiService (single hard-coded gateway). AiProvider entity persists config but is not consumed for routing. Frontend usage/cost is mock data in queries.ts.

items.title: Multi-tenant context from JWT claim
items.desc: TenantContext.TenantId hard-coded null; audit/persistence all fall back to 'default' tenant.
items.notes: TenantContext.cs:22 returns null with a TODO(v2). Needs a tenant_id JWT claim issued by the IdP and mapped here; AuditLogger and saved reports/dashboards would then scope by real tenant.

items.title: Backend RBAC enforcement (fine-grained)
items.desc: Frontend permission matrix exists but backend endpoints only gate Administrator; no report.* role checks.
items.notes: contracts/rbac.ts defines 7 AppRoles + 8 permissions and mapLegacyRoles handles report.* claims, but enforcement is client-side over a mock user. Backend Reports endpoints only RequireAuthorization. Wire report.* role policies server-side.

items.title: Real Users resource endpoint
items.desc: No analytics Users API; useUsers/useUpsertUser/useSetUserActive all run on the localStorage mock.
items.notes: queries.ts:188 explicit TODO 'Users has no analytics backend endpoint — stays on mock'. Build /api/Users (or reuse Admin user service) and flip the hooks off mockApi.users.

items.title: Harden prompt->report 404 mapping
items.desc: KeyNotFoundException from AI service maps to 404 but ProblemDetails handler then errors, client gets 503.
items.notes: Live click-through works end-to-end after two frontend fixes, but a genuine 404 path 503s due to 'AllowStatusCode404Response'. auto-viz presentation access was guarded with ?. ; finish the 404 ProblemDetails fix.

items.title: Replace mock Users/usage/data-source hooks
items.desc: Tenants, system settings, AI usage series, data sources still served from localStorage/static mocks.
items.notes: Reports/Dashboards/Providers/Audit/SemanticModels are gated to real HTTP via VITE_USE_MOCK_API=false; Users, Tenants, SystemSettings, TenantAIConfig, AIUsageSeries, DataSources still mock. Swap behind existing hook signatures once endpoints land.

items.title: Ant Design dark-mode redesign
items.desc: Whole-app visual+structural redesign onto shared UI primitives with a working dark-mode toggle.
items.notes: Shipped (main @ 0ca9b06, deployed). buildTheme(mode)/chartColors(mode) + 11 ui primitives; ~20 screens migrated; split-brain themeMode bug fixed. Charts/routes/auth/i18n unchanged.

items.title: SqlQueryEngine on FarsNezam
items.desc: Whitelisted, parameterized SELECT-only engine with DB-pushed GROUP BY over real FarsNezam tables.
items.notes: SqlQueryEngine + FarsNezamSemanticModelStore (tblProject 171K / tblAzayeSazmanMain 42K / tblHoghoghiProjectList 865K). Identifiers whitelisted, values parameterized; verified live. Gated by ConnectionStrings:AnalyticsDb.

items.title: EF persistence for analytics (5 tables)
items.desc: AddAnalytics migration persists reports, dashboards, AI providers, tenants, and audit events.
items.notes: DbSets: AnalyticsReports/Dashboards/AiProviders/Tenants/AuditEvents; flexible parts as nvarchar(max) JSON. SaveReport/GetReports + Dashboards/AiProviders/Audit slices wired.

items.title: ArvanCloud AI report generation
items.desc: Grounded prompt->ReportDefinition via ArvanCloud OpenAI-compatible gateway with reasoning-model parsing.
items.notes: ArvanReportAiService: prompt grounded on semantic model, strips <think> block, forces dataset. Static 120s HttpClient bypasses Aspire 10s resilience timeout. Audited via ai.generate event.

items.title: Live deploy to analytic.myceo.ir
items.desc: analytics-web SPA + Analytics API deployed behind shared Traefik with IdP PKCE client and CORS.
items.notes: 2nd prod box 185.206.94.116; m19analytics Traefik router; analytics-web public PKCE client seeded in IdP; IdP CORS policy added. Live browser click-through succeeded.

items.title: MunSyncRun/MunReportLog entities + migration
items.desc: mun_sync_runs (per-run) + mun_report_logs (append-only per-attempt) tables on the existing Mabhas19Db.

items.title: Field-mapping + gateway-response-parsing unit tests
items.desc: Pure sp2-row -> addEngineer/saveEngMap mapping, and saveEngineerReport/saveEngMap/addEngineer response parsers, golden-tested against the exact spec JSON.

items.title: KurdNezam SQL reader (sp1/sp2)
items.desc: Raw ADO.NET against ConnectionStrings:KurdNezamDb for WebS_GetListRepToShahrdari + WebS_GetReportFullInfo.

items.title: mahyapardaz gateway client
items.desc: Bearer-auth HttpClient (long timeout, Aspire-resilience bypass) for saveEngineerReport/saveEngMap/addEngineer.

items.title: Sync orchestration + addEngineer-retry flow
items.desc: IMunSanandajSyncService: skip already-succeeded Peygiris, run both flows, auto-create+retry on 'مهندس یافت نشد'.

items.title: 12h background workers + gated DI
items.desc: SaveEngineerReportWorker/SaveEngMapWorker BackgroundServices, feature-gated on ConnectionStrings:KurdNezamDb.

items.title: Runs + Logs admin API
items.desc: GET Runs/Runs/{id}, POST Runs/{workerType}/trigger, GET Logs (paginated/filterable) — Administrator-only.

items.title: mun-sanandaj-web dashboard
items.desc: New Vite/React/AntD/ECharts/framer-motion SPA: live-polling dashboard (KPIs, run chart, live row table) + filterable logs page.

items.title: OIDC auth (Administrator-gated)
items.desc: oidc-client-ts PKCE against the central IdP; mun-sanandaj-web seeded as a public client, gated to the Administrator role.

items.title: Deploy to mun-sanandaj.myceo.ir
items.desc: New service on the 185.206.94.116 stack behind shared Traefik; DNS A-record + KurdNezam/mahyapardaz secrets in deploy/.env.

items.title: C#↔TS scoring parity test
items.desc: Cross-language golden-fixture test asserting C# port and TS engine score identically.
items.notes: Stated invariant ('numbers MUST stay identical') is untested cross-language. C# unit tests + TS tests exist but no shared fixture compares them. Deferred item from docs/architecture-review-2026.md.

items.title: Add CI/CD pipeline
items.desc: PR-gating build+test+lint+scan workflow; none exists in the repo.
items.notes: architecture-review-2026.md claims .github/workflows/ci.yml was added, but no .github directory exists on main — the CI was never committed/merged. (Note: ADR-014 chose trunk-based / no-CI deliberately — revisit before re-adding.)

items.title: Extract shared API client package
items.desc: Dedupe near-identical web/mobile fetch wrappers into one package.
items.notes: web/src/lib/api.ts and mobile/src/lib/api.ts still duplicated. No packages/api-client exists (though @mabhas19/ui and @mabhas19/api-types were extracted). Auth differs (Auth.js vs expo-secure-store) so the shared core needs a pluggable token provider.

items.title: Resolve set-state-in-effect lint debt
items.desc: Checklist UI still uses useEffect data-fetch + derived state via eslint-disable.
items.notes: Dashboard/projects pages modernized to TanStack Query + RSC, but the 6 assessment checklist components still rely on useEffect with react-hooks disables. Fix = derive scores during render.

items.title: Wire OpenTelemetry collector in prod
items.desc: OTel exporter is scaffolded but no collector defined; traces dropped in prod.
items.notes: Exporter only activates if OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set; docker-compose.server.yml defines no collector. Detailed /health is dev-only; only /alive is mapped in prod.

items.title: Fill Infrastructure.IntegrationTests
items.desc: Integration test project is an empty stub (GlobalUsings only).
items.notes: tests/Infrastructure.IntegrationTests contains only GlobalUsings.cs + csproj. No coverage for MinioFileStorage, QuestPdfReportGenerator, SubscriptionService, or the Nezam/FarsNezam providers.

items.title: Add release versioning + CHANGELOG
items.desc: No image tags, version field, or changelog — can't tell what's in prod.
items.notes: No CHANGELOG and no <Version> in Directory.Build.props. Deploy is manual docker save|gzip|pscp|load with a :rollback tag as the only revert mechanism.

items.title: Runtime response validation (Zod)
items.desc: API responses are typed but not validated at the edge.
items.notes: @mabhas19/api-types gives compile-time types, but lib/api.ts JSON.parses responses with no runtime schema check. Review recommended Zod validation alongside generated types.

items.title: Security hardening (CORS, OTP, headers, Docker)
items.desc: CORS allowlist, OTP rate-limits, security headers, non-root containers.
items.notes: Cors:AllowedOrigins allowlist + UseRateLimiter; security headers (nosniff, X-Frame-Options DENY, Referrer-Policy, HSTS); OtpService cooldown/cap/lockout; LogCode false outside Development; non-root Dockerfiles + HEALTHCHECK.

items.title: Generate API types from OpenAPI
items.desc: Contract-first TS types generated from the API OpenAPI document.
items.notes: packages/api-types exists with openapi-typescript generate script, committed openapi.json + generated schema.ts, and an index.ts that web/src/lib/types.ts re-exports — replacing the hand-written DTOs.

items.title: Federated logout redirect fix
items.desc: Web logout now hits IdP connect/logout with post_logout_redirect_uri.
items.notes: auth-context.tsx logout() calls signOut({redirect:false}) then redirects to {issuer}/connect/logout?post_logout_redirect_uri=... so the OIDC session is actually ended. Shipped + deployed 2026-06-25.

items.title: FarsNezam SSO onboarding
items.desc: Magic-link auto-auth + external project import via IdP.
items.notes: FarsNezam wired across src/Infrastructure/External, Analytics semantic-model store, and web SSO finish flow. Project import + typ-gated sections per the onboarding design spec.

items.title: Projects + dashboard redesign
items.desc: TanStack Query + RSC server-prefetch data layer with redesigned pages.
items.notes: dashboard + projects pages use RSC prefetch with dehydrate/HydrationBoundary; lib/queries.ts provides TanStack Query hooks. Replaced the 2020-era useEffect-fetch pattern.

items.title: Web tokens moved to httpOnly cookies
items.desc: Bearer/refresh tokens no longer in localStorage; Auth.js session cookie.
items.notes: web/src/lib/tokens.ts is gone; api.ts attaches the bearer from Auth.js getSession() and re-auths on 401. Tokens now live in an httpOnly session cookie, closing the XSS exposure.

items.title: OpenIddict OIDC server + JWKS
items.desc: Auth-code+PKCE, refresh flow, signed JWT access tokens, discovery/JWKS endpoints.
items.notes: src/Auth/Program.cs + Auth/AuthorizationController.cs. DisableAccessTokenEncryption so resource servers validate via JWKS.

items.title: Multi-method sign-in (password/OTP/Google)
items.desc: Username/password with lockout, mobile OTP, and Google ID-token sign-in all in the IdP.
items.notes: Pages/Account/Login.cshtml.cs + Otp.cshtml.cs; GoogleTokenValidator. OTP self-provisions AuthUser on first verify.

items.title: OTP rate-limit + brute-force lockout
items.desc: Resend cooldown, hourly send cap, and verify-attempt cap invalidating the active code.
items.notes: src/Auth/Otp/OtpService.cs with FixedTimeEquals compare. Tunable via OtpOptions.

items.title: Config-driven OIDC client seeding
items.desc: Seeds mabhas19-web/mobile, plan-web, and analytics-web clients + scopes/roles at startup.
items.notes: src/Auth/Data/AuthDbInitialiser.cs. analytics-web only seeded when its redirect URI is configured.

items.title: Persisted prod signing certificate
items.desc: Prod loads a mounted PFX signing/encryption cert instead of an ephemeral dev cert.
items.notes: OpenIddict__SigningCertificatePath=/certs/openiddict.pfx in docker-compose.server.yml; dev uses AddDevelopmentSigningCertificate. Addresses the ADR-013 ephemeral-key follow-up in prod.

items.title: Move admin user-management into IdP
items.desc: User CRUD/role admin still lives in the main API, not the token-issuing IdP.
items.notes: UserAdminService is in src/Infrastructure/Identity against ApplicationDbContext, but accounts now live in Mabhas19AuthDb. ADR-013 calls to relocate it into src/Auth.

items.title: Password reset / forgot-password flow
items.desc: No self-service password reset or recovery page exists in the IdP.
items.notes: Only Login/Otp/Logout/FarsLogin pages exist; AddDefaultTokenProviders is registered but unused. Needs an email/SMS sender wired for the reset token.

items.title: Shared OTP store (Redis) for scale-out
items.desc: OTP and rate-limit state lives in per-instance memory cache, breaking if the IdP scales.
items.notes: Program.cs uses AddDistributedMemoryCache; cooldown/send-count/attempt counters are not shared across replicas. Swap to a real distributed cache.

items.title: Enrich userinfo claims
items.desc: userinfo returns only sub/name/email; no roles or email_verified despite roles scope.
items.notes: AuthorizationController.UserInfo hard-codes three claims; roles scope is registered/seeded but not reflected at the userinfo endpoint.

items.title: Expand Auth test coverage
items.desc: Only discovery/JWKS are tested; no token-issuance, OTP, or sign-in coverage.
items.notes: Auth.FunctionalTests has only DiscoveryTests. Add token-exchange, OTP rate-limit, and FarsNezam provisioning tests.

items.title: Login UI polish + consent screen
items.desc: Sign-in pages are functional but minimal; no client consent screen.
items.notes: Razor pages render Persian/RTL error strings inline; no branded layout or per-client consent prompt for third-party clients.

items.title: IFileStorage MinIO abstraction
items.desc: Clean IFileStorage contract with MinioFileStorage Put/Get/Delete/presigned implementation.
items.notes: src/Application/Common/Interfaces/IFileStorage.cs + src/Infrastructure/Storage/MinioFileStorage.cs. Singleton IMinioClient.

items.title: Presigned report download URLs
items.desc: 1-hour presigned GET URLs with public-host rewrite so browsers can download PDFs.
items.notes: GetPresignedUrlAsync rewrites host via MinioOptions.PublicEndpoint. Consumed in GenerateReport.cs.

items.title: Production MinIO deploy behind Traefik
items.desc: MinIO live on s3.mabhas19.myceo.ir over TLS via public host so signatures stay valid.
items.notes: docker-compose.server.yml: Minio__Endpoint=public host, UseSSL=true. Pulled via docker.arvancloud.ir mirror.

items.title: Lazy bucket auto-creation
items.desc: EnsureBucketAsync creates the bucket once on first put, cached per instance.

items.title: Bucket lifecycle / retention policy
items.desc: No expiry rule; report objects accumulate forever and orphaned blobs are never reclaimed.
items.notes: IFileStorage.DeleteAsync exists but is never called; AssessmentReport rows are never pruned. Add MinIO ILM expiry rule and/or a cleanup job.

items.title: Pin MinIO image to digest
items.desc: MinIO runs on floating :latest across dev/local/prod; pin to a RELEASE tag + sha256 digest.
items.notes: minio/minio:latest in dev/local; docker.arvancloud.ir/minio/minio:latest in prod. Mutable tag = drift risk.

items.title: Harden MinIO container
items.desc: Add non-root user, read-only rootfs, cap_drop, and a healthcheck to the minio service.
items.notes: minio service has no user:, read_only, cap_drop, or healthcheck (uses condition: service_started only).

items.title: MinIO data backup strategy
items.desc: miniodata volume holds all generated PDFs with no documented backup or restore path.
items.notes: Named volume miniodata on single prod box. No mc mirror / snapshot / offsite copy. Reports regenerable from DB only if SQL survives.

items.title: Tests for MinioFileStorage
items.desc: No unit/integration coverage for put/get/delete/presigned or the host-rewrite logic.
items.notes: No tests/**/*Storage* or *Minio* files. Host-rewrite branch in GetPresignedUrlAsync is untested and prod-critical.

items.title: Presigned URL host/SSL config validation
items.desc: Harden PublicEndpoint/UseSSL handling so a misconfig cannot emit http or wrong-host URLs.
items.notes: Rewrite works (assumes https when scheme omitted) but no validation/logging; correctness relies on Minio__UseSSL=true + correct public host.

items.title: Server-side report streaming fallback
items.desc: If MinIO is unreachable from the browser, there is no API proxy to stream the PDF.
items.notes: GetAsync exists but only presigned URLs are returned; an outage of the public s3 host breaks downloads with no fallback through the API.

items.title: OIDC auth via expo-auth-session
items.desc: PKCE code flow + expo-secure-store token store with one-shot 401 refresh.
items.notes: src/lib/oidc.ts, auth-context.tsx, api.ts, tokens.ts; login.tsx uses useAuthRequest. Password/OTP screens removed in favor of central IdP SSO.

items.title: Projects + assessment screens
items.desc: List/detail/new project screens plus the 6-checklist editors are implemented.
items.notes: app/(app)/projects/* and src/features/assessment/editors/* (Env opaque/trans, monitoring, integrated, group checklist).

items.title: Consume @mabhas19/assessment-core
items.desc: Scoring (scoreTool, calcBuildingGroup, TOTAL_MAX_SCORE) reused from shared package.
items.notes: checklist.tsx and [id].tsx import the shared engine; backend stays system of record via inputJson/resultJson.

items.title: Android debug/release APK build
items.desc: Monorepo-safe Android APK build path works (Metro dedup, no-workspace-root flag).
items.notes: README build steps + eas.json android profiles + EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1; release is debug-signed arm64-v8a.

items.title: fa-IR default with i18n dictionary
items.desc: Persian-first RTL UI with a minimal fa/en translation dictionary.
items.notes: src/i18n.ts; locale is a static const 'fa', so en strings exist but no runtime switcher (see mobile-12).

items.title: Re-point API base to portal gateway
items.desc: API base is hard-pinned to api.mabhas19.myceo.ir; needs future portal gateway URL.
items.notes: Defaults in src/lib/api.ts (API_BASE), app.json extra.apiBase, eas.json EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE; update all when gateway lands.

items.title: Push notifications
items.desc: No push notification support exists; expo-notifications not installed or wired.
items.notes: No expo-notifications in package.json, no token registration or handler. Needs backend push token endpoint + delivery too.

items.title: iOS build / EAS release pipeline
items.desc: EAS profiles are Android-only; no iOS build profile, no submit config.
items.notes: eas.json build.* profiles only set android.buildType; submit.production empty; bundleIdentifier set but no iOS path documented.

items.title: Sync to latest deployed API contracts
items.desc: Verify generated api-types match deployed API; reconcile hidden subscription surface.
items.notes: types.ts re-exports @mabhas19/api-types; endpoints.ts still has subscriptionApi.me though web hides subscription UI. Regenerate/diff against current OpenAPI.

items.title: Offline polish and caching
items.desc: No offline support; every screen live-fetches and only shows an error on failure.
items.notes: projects/index.tsx, [id].tsx, checklist.tsx fetch on focus with no persistence/queue. Consider query cache + draft assessment persistence.

items.title: Surface API errors in UI
items.desc: Report and assessment-save failures are swallowed silently; no toast/alert feedback.
items.notes: [id].tsx onDownloadReport catch is empty; checklist.tsx onSave has no error branch; no Alert usage anywhere in app/.

items.title: Runtime language switcher
items.desc: Locale is a fixed const so the en-US dictionary is unreachable at runtime.
items.notes: src/i18n.ts exports locale='fa' as a const; wire to expo-localization + a user toggle to expose en strings.

items.title: Delete-project UI
items.desc: projectsApi.remove exists but no screen exposes project deletion.
items.notes: endpoints.ts has remove(id); no delete action/confirm in projects screens. i18n already has an unused 'delete' key.

items.title: Write gateway architecture spec
items.desc: Document YARP gateway design: routing, JWT, rate limiting, deploy topology behind Traefik.
items.notes: Decided in brainstorming and parked; no formal spec/ADR committed yet. In-progress because the decision exists but needs writing up before scaffolding.

items.title: Scaffold YARP reverse-proxy project
items.desc: Create new .NET reverse-proxy project with YARP package, host wiring, and config layout.
items.notes: No project exists. Foundation for all other gateway work; mirror existing src/ layout conventions.

items.title: Define routes (mabhas19 API first)
items.desc: Configure YARP route/cluster mappings for mabhas19 API as the first backend.
items.notes: Single public entry point fronting *.myceo.ir service APIs; start with api.mabhas19.myceo.ir.

items.title: Central JWT validation
items.desc: Validate bearer tokens at the gateway against auth.myceo.ir before forwarding upstream.
items.notes: Authority auth.myceo.ir, audience mabhas19.api, RoleClaimType=role. IP-pin auth host for deterministic JWKS as in existing api/web.

items.title: Central rate limiting + CORS
items.desc: Add gateway-wide rate-limiting policies and centralized CORS configuration.
items.notes: ASP.NET RateLimiter middleware in front of YARP; consolidate per-service CORS into one place.

items.title: Correlation-ID + request logging
items.desc: Inject/propagate correlation IDs and emit structured access logs for forwarded requests.
items.notes: Forward correlation header to upstreams so traces span gateway and backend services.

items.title: Unified ProblemDetails passthrough
items.desc: Ensure gateway-generated errors and upstream errors return consistent ProblemDetails JSON.
items.notes: Match the api's ProblemDetailsExceptionHandler shape so clients see one error contract.

items.title: Deploy gateway container behind Traefik
items.desc: Containerize gateway and attach to shared Traefik network as the public entry point.
items.notes: Add service to docker-compose.server.yml on external traefik network, cert resolver myresolver; build-locally/save-load due to blocked CDN in Iran. Tag :rollback before first deploy.

items.title: Re-point web base URL to gateway
items.desc: Switch NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE and Auth.js env so web calls the gateway host.
items.notes: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE is baked at build time; requires rebuild of the standalone web image.

items.title: Re-point mobile base URL to gateway
items.desc: Update mobile client API base URL and OIDC config to target the gateway.
items.notes: expo-auth-session client; coordinate release once gateway routes are stable.

items.title: Placeholder route for future plan service
items.desc: Reserve a YARP route/cluster stub for the planned 'plan' service backend.
items.notes: No 'plan' service exists yet; add a disabled/stub cluster so onboarding it later is config-only.

items.title: Build static HTML status board
items.desc: Single-file static HTML board rendering the roadmap columns by status.
items.notes: Being built now — this very board. Renders done/in-progress/not-started columns from roadmap.json.

items.title: Editable roadmap.json data file
items.desc: Structured JSON data file holding all per-service backlog items the board renders.
items.notes: Source of truth for the board; hand-editable so status updates don't require code changes.

items.title: Portal README
items.desc: Document board structure, roadmap.json schema, and how to update/deploy.

items.title: EN/FA language toggle
items.desc: Bilingual toggle so the board reads in both English and Persian/RTL.
items.notes: Optional. Matches the portal's fa-IR default + en-US convention.

items.title: Gated static deploy at status.myceo.ir
items.desc: nginx static site on analytics box behind shared Traefik, auth/IP-gated, DNS-only no-CDN.
items.notes: Attach to existing Traefik on analytics box; basic-auth or IP allowlist; grey/DNS-only record, CDN off.

items.title: Wire roadmap.json into recurring workflow
items.desc: Recurring workflow regenerates roadmap.json so the board stays current automatically.
items.notes: Closes the loop so backlog inventory refreshes on a schedule instead of by hand.
